flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Arapahoe Community College rose 19% between 2017 and 2020 ($10.0k → $11.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Arapahoe Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Arapahoe Community College rose 31% between 2009 and 2010 (7.9% → 10.4%).

flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Arapahoe Community College are 22% above the public certificate-predominant peer median ($48.3k vs $39.7k).
